title: ໄຂ່
description: Whose egg is this? The crocodile, the turtle, the penguin, the chicken and the emu all check to see if the egg belongs to them.

pages.text: Bloom Library catalog card for "ໄຂ່" (Lao). Whose egg is this? The crocodile, the turtle, the penguin, the chicken and the emu all check to see if the egg belongs to them.
